by_customization_type.description: Specifies the type of customization applied to the foundation model, such as tuning or configuration options.

by_inference_type.description: Indicates the type of inference that the foundation model performs, such as real-time or batch processing.

by_output_modality.description: Defines the kind of output generated by the foundation model, for example, text, image, or audio.

by_provider.description: Identifies the provider offering the foundation model, such as AWS or another third-party vendor.
